MYFIRSTCHARACTER-REORGANIZE.description:
#Draw !C! cards.
Place 1 card from your *hand on top of your *Draw Pile*.
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-REORGANIZE.title: Reorganize
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-REORGANIZE.selectionScr: Choose a card to put on top of your Draw Pile.
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-FLASH.description:
#Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies.
Gain !B! *Block.
At the end of your turn, if this is at the top of your *Draw Pile*, play it.
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-FLASH.title: Flash
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-INSTABILITY.description: At the start of your turn, add an *Enchantment to 1 card in your *Hand.
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-INSTABILITY.title: Instability
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-FORCEFIELD.description: #Whenever you add a card to your *Draw Pile*, gain !B! *Block
MYFIRSTCHARACTER-FORCEFIELD.title: Instability
